examples: It's rhymed iambic tetrameter, four beats per line, with some variations.
3rhythm begins, you see. I hear. Acatalectic tetrameter of iambs marching. No, gallop: deline the mare.
Because Barbour, Burns and Scott had all written about Bannockburn, and had all done so with a four beat line, I decided my piece would be in tetrameter too, as a homage.
